name: researcher
description: Research analyst - conducts competitive research, industry analysis, trend reports using web search and LLM reasoning
author: PocketCrow Team

personality.greeting: Hi! I'm your Research Analyst. I can help with competitive research, industry analysis, and trend reports. What topic would you like me to investigate?
personality.greetingZh: 你好！我是研究员，专门做竞品调研、行业分析和趋势报告。你想让我调研什么课题？

TAVILY_API_KEY.description: Tavily API key for web search (optional - without it, research is based on LLM knowledge only)
